# Neon Code Studio

Professional Web Development Studio specializing in high-performance React, TypeScript, and modern AI-powered applications.

## Profile
- **Founder**: Eduard v Deventer
- **Specialties**: Full-Stack Development, React 19, TypeScript, TanStack Start, AI Integration.
- **Vibe**: Neon, Comic-inspired, High-performance.
- **Location**: Cape Town, South Africa (Global Service).

## Core Services
1. Custom Web Applications
2. AI-Powered SaaS Development
3. High-Performance Landing Pages
4. Technical Architecture Consulting

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, Next.js, TanStack Start, Tailwind CSS 4, Framer Motion.
- Backend: Node.js, Cloudflare Workers, Prisma, PostgreSQL.
- Tools: Vite, Bun, Biome, ESLint.

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/EduardvDeventer
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/vudovn
